lessons.title: Pin the Reviewer Model by Snapshot, Not by Floating Alias
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P019 deployed Tier 1.5 per-PR cross-model review across meridian, legara-portals, and legara-site.

lessons.title: Integration Harness Must Seed Licensing Bridges, Not Just Entities
lessons.one_sentence_summary: S1.4a's service layer validates that a provider is "licensed at the target client" before allowing a scheduled visit.

lessons.title: Atlas Dev Protocol — Numbered Prompts, Single-Codebox Handoffs
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Prior to this lesson, prompt handoffs drifted.

lessons.title: Role-Array Gates Don't Help When the Render Path Short-Circuits
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Meridian's `src/views/partials/nav.ejs` declares a `sections` config array where each item carries a `roles: [...]` allowlist.

lessons.title: `--test-concurrency=1` for TRUNCATE-Cleaned Integration Suites Against a Shared DB
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Pre-S1.4's meridian PR added two new integration test files, bringing the count from 3 to 5.

lessons.title: Replay Migrations as Isolated Child Processes, Not Inside One Node Process
lessons.one_sentence_summary: S1.2b's `scripts/setup-test-db.mjs` initially applied `schema-pg.sql` via pg's node driver and replayed the ~130 migrations with a simple `for (const f of files) { const m = require(f); await (m.up||m.run)(); }` loop.

lessons.title: Defer Backend Endpoints, Ship UI v1 With Documented TODOs
lessons.one_sentence_summary: S1.2c's spec called for three combobox/type-ahead surfaces (client org, preferred provider, role-gated archived toggle) that all depend on backend endpoints that don't exist yet: `/api/v1/auth/me` (returns user role + scope), admin-scope `/

lessons.title: Zod .default() Survives .partial() — Watch for Silent UPDATEs
lessons.one_sentence_summary: The S1.1 patients service built `updateSchema = createSchema.omit({ client_org_id: true, ehr_patient_id: true }).partial()`.

lessons.title: Tailwind v4 + shadcn — CSS-First, @theme inline, tw-animate-css
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Canonical shadcn install docs assume Tailwind v3 with `tailwind.config.js` (`theme.extend.colors`, `plugins: [require('tailwindcss-animate')]`, `darkMode: 'class'`).

lessons.title: Pin Pre-release Deps With a Graduation Plan
lessons.one_sentence_summary: `@tremor/react@3.18.7` (stable) peers `react@^18` and refuses to resolve against React 19.

lessons.title: When Adding an App to a Portals Monorepo, Touch IAM Twice
lessons.one_sentence_summary: S1.0 deploy pipeline green'd the GitHub Actions secrets, the S3 bucket, the CloudFront distribution, and the deploy.yml matrix — and then CI failed twice in succession on AWS AccessDenied.

lessons.title: Mirror Repo Conventions Over Prompt-Written URLs
lessons.one_sentence_summary: The S1.0 architecture prompt and diagnostic both wrote the canary URL as `admin.golegara.com/patients-admin/*` — a path-based topology on a shared admin distribution.

lessons.title: Radix Tooltip Is Hover/Focus — Use Popover for Tap-to-Reveal
lessons.one_sentence_summary: S1.0 canary Phase 3 exhibit 14 was specified as "Radix Tooltip on three surfaces ...

lessons.title: Story-Expectations Is a Living Document
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Provider Detail Tier 1 overhaul shipped and scored 83/100 — 2 points short of the 85 target.

lessons.title: Every Ship Needs a Verification Evaluator
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Client Detail overhaul shipped via PR #144 scored 57/100 on post-deploy rescan.

lessons.title: New React Surfaces Must Use the Locked Design-Language Stack
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Roger flagged that Meridian often ships UI that "works but looks and feels 15 years old" — stock HTML selects, upload forms without drag-drop, utilitarian tables with zebra stripes, spinners where skeletons belong, system fonts, inconsisten

lessons.title: Meridian Owns Company Profile Data, ERP Owns Transactional
lessons.one_sentence_summary: During v3 diagnostics, it became clear no client in prod had address, phone, email, or website populated (0 of 7).

lessons.title: Scanner Target Must Be Explicitly Pinned, Not Heuristically Chosen
lessons.one_sentence_summary: The contextual-action scanner initially picked its target client via `ORDER BY last_touch DESC NULLS LAST, id ASC` — which landed on org id 6 when no client had outreach events (all nulls → id asc → first).

lessons.title: Cowork-Drafted Code Prompts Bypass the UX Standards Gate
lessons.one_sentence_summary: The 2FA sprint drafted 5 Code prompts in Cowork as standalone markdown files (`sys/prompts/prompt-2fa-phase*.md`).

lessons.title: All Meridian Forms Must Submit Through HTMX — No Standard HTML POST
lessons.one_sentence_summary: PR #109 fixed the duplicate portal user constraint error by returning `res.status(409).json({ error: "..." })`.

lessons.title: psr-portal Is Decommissioned — PSRs Are Meridian Users
lessons.one_sentence_summary: A feedback audit and Code prompt referenced `apps/psr-portal/` as one of the portal apps to migrate.

lessons.title: Never Reference iCloud Paths — All Repos Live at ~/code/
lessons.one_sentence_summary: A merge command was generated using the old iCloud path (`~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Legara - Marketing V2/meridian`).

lessons.title: Three-Tier Feedback Policy — Governance Conflict Resolution + Platform Standardization
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Full audit of both repos revealed six different feedback mechanisms used inconsistently: Notyf toasts (36 in Meridian), browser `alert()` (15 in Meridian, 11 `Alert.alert()` in provider-app), persistent banners (2 — only PSR dashboard), ful

lessons.title: SQLite Integer Booleans Don't Survive PostgreSQL — Grep for Integer Literals in INSERT/UPDATE
lessons.one_sentence_summary: `createProviderInvite` and `createClientInvite` in `src/services/operations-portal.js` used `VALUES (..., 1, 0)` for `is_active` and `onboarding_complete` columns.

lessons.title: prod-migrate Phase H Must Scan All Indexed Tables, Not Just Primary
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Migration 115 created indexes on both `users` and `portal_users` tables.

lessons.title: Production Migration Is a Manual Step — Check After Every Merge
lessons.one_sentence_summary: After merging the Provider Bench PR (#100), the evaluator hit 500 errors on every bench API call.

lessons.title: Governance Sync Should Be Automatic, Not Triggered
lessons.one_sentence_summary: After the evaluator scored bench-enroll and bench-dashboard, the scores existed in the evaluator JSON but weren't reflected in the registry, atlas, or scoring-history until manually triggered.

lessons.title: Error Feedback Must Be Persistent — Toasts Are For Success Only
lessons.one_sentence_summary: 10.C3 migrated all error banners on the PSR dashboard to notyf toasts.

lessons.title: Stress-Test Systems With Zero-Context Specialized Subagents Before Trusting Them
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Roger suggested spinning up specialized subagents (systems architect, cognitive psychologist, QA lead, product consultant) with zero prior context to evaluate the BDD governance system.

lessons.title: Prompt Claims About Existing Validation Must Be Verified, Not Assumed
lessons.one_sentence_summary: The 10.A3 prompt stated "server-side NPI validation already exists in the POST route." It didn't — the route forwarded `body.npi` straight to `createProvider()` with no format check.

lessons.title: prod-migrate Migration Type Coverage — Flag When a New Migration Shape Needs Its Own Phase F Branch
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Migration 108 (ALTER TABLE ...

lessons.title: Lifecycle Evaluation Is a Scoping Tool, Not Just a Quality Tool
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Phase 9.8 closed at an EJS-polish ceiling — 8 scored runs made it undeniable that Acts 1/3/5 were blocked on missing features (org CRUD, team detail, provider portal sessions), not UX polish.

lessons.title: UX Patterns Are Platform Standards, Not Optional Polish
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Phase 9.8 revealed that every lifecycle act scored poorly on the same categories: silent failures, missing feedback, empty states with no guidance, raw error strings, forms without validation indicators.

lessons.title: Automated UX Evaluation Beats Manual Walkthrough for Volume
lessons.one_sentence_summary: manual browser walkthroughs (Phases 9.2–9.5) found ~11 findings per session.

lessons.title: HTMX Polling Breaks networkidle — Use domcontentloaded + Heading Assertion
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Meridian EJS pages use `hx-trigger="every 10s"` for HTMX polling.

lessons.title: hx-post Attribute Selectors Are Stable, CSS Class Selectors Are Not
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Act 4 tests used CSS class selectors for Cancel/Resend buttons.

lessons.title: Lifecycle Test Scores Need 3 Consecutive Runs for Validity
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Act 4 scored 3.6 on Run 3 and 2.6 on Run 2 with identical code.

lessons.title: PRO Authority Model — Intermediary for Providers, Supervisor for PSRs
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Phase 6.5f design revealed that the PRO has two fundamentally different authority relationships: intermediary between provider and client (mediation), and direct supervisor over PSRs (chain of command).

lessons.title: Track Unlimited PTO for Coverage Awareness, Not Payroll
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Legara PSRs have unlimited PTO.

lessons.title: Task Completion Does Not Equal Status Transition
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Phase 6.6 credentialing task delegation design faced a choice: when a PSR completes a "collect BLS cert" task, should the credentialing status auto-transition from `not_started` to `submitted`?

lessons.title: Governance-Commit Prompts Must Pre-Scan Shipped Commits Against Open Roadmap Items
lessons.one_sentence_summary: a Phase 6 prompt proposes work against an item in `sys/pre-launch-roadmap.md` or the FIND-* audit log.

lessons.title: Every REPORT-Mode CI Gate Ships With an Expiration Date or It Rots Into Lies
lessons.one_sentence_summary: the portals `portal-smoke` gate ran "green" in CI for an unknown number of weeks under `continue-on-error: true`.

lessons.title: REPORT-First Does Not Apply to Visibility Work — Enforced Local Rules Land in ENFORCE
lessons.one_sentence_summary: the house default for new CI gates has been REPORT-first → ENFORCE after observation window.

lessons.title: Phase 0 Must Check Third-Party Integration Checks, Not Just Repo-Local Workflow YAML
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Phase 0 of the 9f legara-site CI greenfield reported the repo had "no CI gates" based on `ls .github/workflows/` — which returned empty.

lessons.title: Git Repos Do Not Belong in iCloud Drive
lessons.one_sentence_summary: iCloud Drive syncs both tracked content AND the `.git/` metadata layer.

lessons.title: Governance-Commit Prompts Must Scan for Orphaned Predecessor Prompts at Authoring Time
lessons.one_sentence_summary: close-out prompts for session N are authored at the end of session N, AFTER that session's governance-commit boundary has already closed.

lessons.title: Workspace Consumer Linted in CI Must Build Its Workspace Producer in the Same Job
lessons.one_sentence_summary: `eslint-plugin-import` with `import/no-unresolved` runs node/TS module resolution against every non-relative import.

lessons.title: Concurrent Red Siblings on a PR Are Not Necessarily Caused by That PR — Always Diff Before Blaming
lessons.one_sentence_summary: PR #7 shipped with 5/6 CI gates green and one red (provider-app-lint).

lessons.title: Promote Prompt-Draft Path Pre-Scan to Mechanical Enforcement After Three Firings
lessons.one_sentence_summary: after a Phase 0 hedge fires on three consecutive cross-repo prompts, promote it to a draft-time enforcement step captured as a REQ in `sys/platform-requirements.md`.

lessons.title: Phase 0 Discovery Must Resolve Gitlinks and Verify Named Packages Exist
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Phase 0 discovery for any cross-repo prompt MUST include:

lessons.title: Prompt-Assumed Infrastructure Must Be Verified Before Drafting
lessons.one_sentence_summary: before drafting a prompt step that depends on infrastructure presence (linter, test runner, package manager, package layout, CI workflow shape, helper-script existence, framework choice), open the repo and confirm the infrastructure is ther

lessons.title: Gates Often Catch Bugs in Their Own Introducing PR — Plan for It
lessons.one_sentence_summary: when scoping a gate-introduction PR, allocate explicit time/scope budget for "fix the existing instances the new gate catches." Don't assume the introducing PR is just gate code + canary fixtures.

lessons.title: Mirror Repo Literals in Prompts — Grep Before Inventing Any Repo-Specific Name
lessons.one_sentence_summary: before writing a prompt step that names a repo-specific literal, open the canonical consumer (or the schema/migration/source of truth) in the repo and copy the exact name.

lessons.title: Promote a Test Fixture to a CI Workflow When the Regression Class Has Systemic Cost
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - The data-seed fingerprint prompt (`sys/prompts/prompt-prod-migrate-data-seed-fingerprint.md`) specified a canary fixture under `tests/prod-migrate/` with 7 behavior-matrix cells, per `REQ-GATE-CANARY`.

lessons.title: Throwing-Getter Pattern for Rename-to-Disambiguate Refactors
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Phase 6.1 DIV-004 closed a UI/API name collision in the meridian repo: `requirePsrProviderAccess` + `requireProviderOnSchedule` existed in both `src/middleware/psr-scope.js` (UI-scoped, SOFT behavior — redirect on denial) and `src/api/mid

lessons.title: Preserve Server-Side Gates When UI Filtering Already Hides the Symptom
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Phase 6.1 DIV-003 was the honest triage call of the session.

lessons.title: RBAC Divergence Root Cause = Inline Role List Duplication
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Phase 6 RBAC audit found 13 divergences across ~280 meridian routes.

lessons.title: Playwright storageState Does Not Capture sessionStorage
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Phase 9.1's first full-suite green run was blocked until we diagnosed that Playwright's `storageState` (which Meridian UI specs used cleanly) captures cookies + localStorage ONLY.

lessons.title: prod-migrate.mjs Phase F Short-Circuits data-seed Migrations
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Phase 9.1 Loop 1 discovered that migration 086 (`data-seed` type, seeds test users into `users` + `portal_users`) was being marked "already applied" without ever inserting a row.

lessons.title: Per-Email Login Rate Limit Punishes Test Frameworks That Re-Auth Per Test
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - `src/api/v1/auth.js:10` enforces a per-email rate limit of 5 attempts per 15-minute sliding window via an in-memory Map.

lessons.title: Portal sessionStorage Key Convention — legara_{client|provider}_{token,refresh_token,user}
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - The Legara portals store auth state under a clean but previously-undocumented convention.

lessons.title: Explicit CLI/Git Guidance for Roger
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Roger is not a terminal/git power user.

lessons.title: Hardcoded Production Identifiers Outlive the Systems They Point At
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - `src/services/docusign-envelope.js:12-16` had a fallback `accountId = process.env.DOCUSIGN_ACCOUNT_ID || 'b9614d39-...'`.

lessons.title: Secret Capture via `cat >` Echoes to Terminal
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - During NEW.9 HMAC key setup, I directed Roger to paste the Connect HMAC into `/tmp/hmac.txt` via `cat > /tmp/hmac.txt` (Ctrl-D to close).

lessons.title: HMAC-Verified Webhooks Need Raw-Body Capture + Multi-Signature-Header Handling
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - NEW.9's base commit (`55a795a`) shipped two HMAC-verification bugs that both fired on first live envelope: (1) `JSON.stringify(req.body)` doesn't round-trip byte-for-byte, so HMAC computed over re-serialized body didn't match what DocuSig

lessons.title: Schema-Drift Gate Triage — Five Categories
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Window A closed the 97-finding schema-drift backlog to 0 and flipped the gate to ENFORCE in 27m 50s.

lessons.title: Walk-Away Prompts Must Verify Problem State First
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Session 50 fired three parallel walk-away prompts for REQ-GATE-SCHEMA-DRIFT, REQ-GATE-SILENT-CATCH-RETROFIT, REQ-GATE-DOCKER-FRESH-BUILD.

lessons.title: Configurable Auth Keys — Never Hardcode Storage Keys in Shared Packages
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - When a shared package (api-client) is used by multiple apps with different storage needs, hardcoding `legara_token` means all apps write to the same key.

lessons.title: Production RDS is VPC-Only — Cannot Connect From Local Machine
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Production RDS (`erp-database.cfqu0w0k8r2v.us-west-1.rds.amazonaws.com`) returns ETIMEDOUT when accessed from Roger's Mac.

lessons.title: API Field Names Must Match TypeScript Types
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Reinforced from Session 40c: "The frontend types are the contract.

lessons.title: Provider Placement Timeline — NEVER say "5 months from contract"
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - The old "5 months from contract" claim included ~3 months of pre-contract negotiation.

lessons.title: Internal Hire Ramp Timeline — NEVER claim "11 months" or "11.2 months"
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - The old 11.2-month claim was sequential math (recruit 3mo → onboard 3wk → credential 3mo → payer panel 3mo → panel build 3mo).

lessons.title: All Code Work → Claude Code, Not Cowork (Rule 26)
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - VM sandbox blocks outbound API calls (403 proxy).

lessons.title: Legara Is a Platform, NOT a "Behavioral Health Group"
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - "Behavioral health group" implies clinical supervision hierarchy, medical group structure, professional corporation.

lessons.title: Terminology — "behavioral health" vs "BH" vs "psych"
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - "Behavioral health" is the PREFERRED term in all external content

lessons.title: No AI Giveaways in External Communications
Roger is a Builder/Strategist, Not an Ops Guy
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Roger's identity: he spots unmet needs and builds solutions around them.

lessons.title: Provider Bench — Product Naming and Framing
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - "Provider Bench" is the approved name for the feature where Legara providers publish spare capacity for other FQHCs.

lessons.title: PRO Contact Should Feel Immediate, Not Like a Contact Form
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Every client should have their PRO listed prominently with direct phone and email.

lessons.title: Client Portal Billing Model Visibility
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Legara Inc clients (SHC, NAH): see itemized columns (Professional Fees, Platform Fees, Total Billed) + Provider Detail tab

lessons.title: Legara Controls Scheduling (Key Differentiator)
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Legara's MSO handles patient scheduling for Legara providers.

lessons.title: Clinical Collateral Must Address Medical Staff, Not Just Leadership
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Clinical directors/CMOs are not the only audience for clinical integration materials.

lessons.title: Augment, Don't Replace
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Legara AUGMENTS existing FQHC teams.

lessons.title: Presign SignedHeaders Trap (P5.DS.NEW.4)
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Presigned S3 URLs that declare `ServerSideEncryption`, `SSEKMSKeyId`, or `ContentLength` in SignedHeaders will return `SignatureDoesNotMatch` when a browser `fetch()` does the PUT, because fetch() doesn't send those headers.

lessons.title: Subcategory-Aware RBAC Requires Subcategory to Reach checkAccess (P5.DS.NEW.5)
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - When subcategory-level RBAC rules exist (e.g., Ops-only subcategories inside an otherwise-accessible category), the subcategory must be passed through to the access-check function.

lessons.title: RBAC Scope Drift — Generic Middleware Defaults Wider Than Ops-Only (P5.DS.NEW.8)
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Generic middleware like `requireWrite` often covers admin + operations + sales.

lessons.title: Log Dates = Actual Send Dates, Not Session Dates
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Discovered 3/31/2026 (Session 16): Three Sales Nav InMails were logged with date "2026-03-31" but were actually sent on 3/30 (confirmed by checking the Sales Nav inbox, which showed "Mon").

lessons.title: Governance Protocols Run at Completion, Not at Session End
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Discovered 3/31/2026 (Session 17): After completing testimonial work (new data file, site deployment, text revision), Roger asked for a governance audit.

lessons.title: No Physical Room — And ZERO "Telehealth" in Cold Emails
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Legara providers deliver care via telehealth as the modality.

lessons.title: Per-Encounter Pricing — NEVER Say "Per Provider"
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Legara charges a flat rate PER ENCOUNTER.

lessons.title: Brand Messaging Hierarchy — Differentiation First, Financial Validates
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Every external touchpoint follows this sequence:

lessons.title: Legara Works WITHIN the FQHC's Infrastructure, Not Independently
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Legara embeds into the FQHC's existing systems: their EHR, their referral workflows, their clinical environment.

lessons.title: Don't Explain Partnership Mechanics in Cold Emails
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - The "what we need from you" / "the ask on your end" / "referral relationship" framing is RETIRED from cold emails.

lessons.title: Infrastructure References Must Be Precise, Not Sweeping
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Saying "Legara handles the credentialing, scheduling, billing, and compliance" claims Legara takes over four operational departments.

lessons.title: Legara NEVER Bills Anyone Directly
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - The FQHC bills for encounters under THEIR OWN NPI.

lessons.title: Provider Compensation Structure — MSO Fee vs Platform Fee
lessons.one_sentence_summary: is what the FQHC pays Legara.

lessons.title: Rate Visibility Scoping — Who Sees What
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Provider effective rate (net $/enc) is NEVER shown on client-facing surfaces.

lessons.title: Client Billing Model Landscape
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Client pays flat rate (~$155/$165) to Fidare.

lessons.title: Settled Week — Single Source of Truth
lessons.one_sentence_summary: `is_week_settled(week_ending DATE)` — created in migration 076.

lessons.title: Virus Scan — GuardDuty Malware Protection over ClamAV Lambda
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Use AWS GuardDuty Malware Protection for S3 instead of a custom ClamAV Lambda.

lessons.title: Meridian Nav Nesting — Architecture Standard
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Any Meridian section with more than one logical view gets nested sub-pages.

lessons.title: ERP Week Endings Are Sundays (DOW=0), Not Fridays
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - The ERP `settlements.week_ending` and all derived tables use Sundays (DOW=0) as the canonical week boundary.

lessons.title: Cold Email CTA Progression — Links First, Call Last
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Asking for a call on Touch 1 is high friction.

lessons.title: SQLite→PG Migration — API Routes Need Same Treatment as Internal Routes
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - When migrating from SQLite (synchronous) to PG (async), every `db.get()` / `db.all()` call must be `await`ed.

lessons.title: PG Returns JavaScript Date Objects, Not Strings
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - SQLite stores dates as text strings.

lessons.title: PG Aggregate Functions Need Explicit CAST for Numeric Operations
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - PG's `SUM()` over a text column does string concatenation, not numeric addition.

lessons.title: NEVER Query ERP Directly from Portal Endpoints
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Attempted to query the ERP database directly from the client portal `/mission-cash` endpoint using a new `queryErp()` function.

lessons.title: Two-Axis Settlement Model — Entity Type ≠ Billing Model
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Entity type (from `clinician_entities`) drives **provider payment** method.

lessons.title: Supervision Is Bundled Into Professional Compensation
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - The $15/NP-encounter supervision fee is NOT a separate earnings_type in settlement_earnings_calcs.

lessons.title: One Client Code System — No Aliases
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - The alias layer (NAH→NATV, SHC→SHASTA, IHS→IBHS, NHC→NH) caused lookup mismatches between `organizations.erp_client_code` and the `erp_*` tables.

lessons.title: Atomic Sync — DELETE Must Be Inside the Transaction
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - All 14 ERP sync tables had DELETE outside the transaction and INSERT inside.

lessons.title: Add Direct Query Fallback for Critical Sync Tables
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - When a sync table is persistently empty, don't keep fixing the sync and hoping — add a direct ERP query fallback so the user-facing feature works regardless.

lessons.title: ResponsiveContainer Needs Explicit Height
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - Recharts `ResponsiveContainer` with `height="100%"` inside a flex-grow parent chain resolves to 0px.

lessons.title: Use the Real Brand Logo — Never Auto-Generate
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - The `generate-logo-svg.js` script converted Poppins 800 to SVG paths.

lessons.title: "Set a Reminder" Is a Dead Instruction — Write It Into a Mechanism
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - During the API contract validation phase 2 handoff, Cowork told Roger "set a reminder to check CloudWatch 24h and 72h after deploy." That instruction was useless in practice because Cowork has no persistent memory between sessions and Rog

lessons.title: activity.log Silently Swallows Errors — Audit Writes Must Be Strict
lessons.one_sentence_summary: - `src/services/activity.js` wraps the `INSERT INTO user_activity_log` in a try/catch with an empty catch block: `async function log(db, userId, action, path, detail, ip) { try { await db.run(...) } catch (e) {} }`.

lessons.title: Application-Layer Tenant Scope Without a DB-Level Constraint Is a Cross-Tenant Leak Waiting to Happen
lessons.one_sentence_summary: W2.1 `promoteToClient` email collision on `portal_users`.

lessons.title: Best-Effort Loop Error Handlers Are Equivalent to Silent Data Loss
lessons.one_sentence_summary: W1.1 `promoteToClient` wrapped each iteration of its contact-inheritance loop in a `try/catch` that demoted failures to `warnings.push(...)` entries in the response JSON, and did the same for the activity-log write.

lessons.title: Same Symptom ≠ Same Cause — Never Project a Known Bug Pattern Onto a New Surface
lessons.one_sentence_summary: W2.0.4 opened with a 500 on `/organizations` and `/contacts`.

lessons.title: β Sequencing — Three-Commit Pattern for Schema-Type Migrations That Affect Live Reader Code
lessons.one_sentence_summary: changing a column's type (TEXT→DATE, INT→BIGINT, etc.) on a table that N reader sites actively query.

lessons.title: Bigint COUNT/SUM Coerces to JavaScript String — Cast at the Query or Parse at the Call Site
lessons.one_sentence_summary: /providers stats cards rendering "Total Enc (YTD) 022872117192911" — string concatenation of individual provider YTD counts.

lessons.title: Defensive Cast Was Insurance, Not Correction — Preflight Before Assuming You Know the Data
lessons.one_sentence_summary: W2.0.5-α1 shipped a defensive `::date::text` writer cast on `erp-sync.js:355` (`clw.week_closed_locked_ending::date::text AS week_ending`), on the assumption that the source column might contain non-ISO-format strings that would break the u

lessons.title: Silent Catches Convert SQL Errors Into Empty UI States — The Cluster Matters More Than the Instance
lessons.one_sentence_summary: W2.0.4's empty `/providers` tab investigation kept unrolling because `catch(e) { return [] }` and `catch(e) { return { total: 0 } }` patterns in route handlers were swallowing the real error (`text >= timestamptz` type mismatch) and returni

lessons.title: Browser Verification Sweeps — Distinguish "Route Doesn't Exist" (404) From "Auth-Gated" (403) From "Actually Broken" (500) Before Flagging Anything
lessons.one_sentence_summary: the post-migration 067 verification sweep hit 5 routes.

lessons.title: Column-Rename Prompts Must Distinguish JOIN-ON Sites from SELECT-Projection Sites
lessons.one_sentence_summary: α2-core Cat G prompt literal was `ps.client_id AS client_code` at both L415 and L437 of `command-center.js`.

lessons.title: Phase 0 Schema Audits Must Check the Full SELECT, Not Just the CloudWatch-Reported Column
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Postgres stops at the first invalid column reference in a query.

lessons.title: Phase 0 Consumer Audits Find Silent Bonus Beneficiaries With No CloudWatch Signal
lessons.one_sentence_summary: when Phase 0 greps the codebase for every reference to a broken column (e.g., `cd.expiry_date`), it finds sites that consume the column without the specific comparison that CloudWatch caught.

lessons.title: Unblocking a SQL Error Reveals the Next Layer — Treat New Signatures as Expected Handback Output
lessons.one_sentence_summary: when a query has multiple invalid column references or type mismatches, fixing the first one advances the Postgres planner past the initial barrier, which lets it reach and fail on the second.

lessons.title: Aggressive-Mode Bundling Is Safe When Phase 0 Hard Gates Are Preserved
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Roger clarified mid-session that Meridian has no real users yet — it's internal dev/test only, he's the only user, and the system is being built for internal deployment.

lessons.title: Never Cite Repo Infrastructure Claims From Memory — Verify Before Writing a Prompt
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Cowork wrote a walk-away master prompt (`w2-0-7-0-8-MASTER-telehealth-and-gates.md`) that assumed legara-portals had "an existing ~170-test Playwright suite" it would tag with `@smoke` for post-deploy verification.

lessons.title: Default Testing Tooling Versions to `@latest`, Not Pinned Versions From Stale Knowledge Cutoff
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Cowork wrote `portals-testing-bootstrap.md` with pinned versions for the testing stack: `vitest@^2.1.0`, `@playwright/test@^1.48.0`, `@testing-library/react@^16.0.0`.

lessons.title: Phase 0 Must Re-Read Local Config Files, Never Assume Framework Defaults
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Cowork wrote `portals-testing-bootstrap.md` assuming Vite dev server ports follow the framework default (`5173`, `5174`, `5175`, `5176` for the 4 web apps).

lessons.title: CI Drift Gates Produce Meta-Findings — The Gate's Reference Schema Can Be Stale Too
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Session 46 Phase G-MER shipped a SCHEMA-DRIFT gate in meridian's CI.

lessons.title: Gate Existence ≠ Gate Function — The Silent-Catch Scan Engine Was a No-Op for Months
Name Tools for Their Capability, Not Their First Use Case — SSM Tunnel Tool Was Invisible to Audit Prompt
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Session 49 built `scripts/prod-migrate.mjs` with an extracted `scripts/lib/ssm-tunnel.mjs` as a reusable SSM tunnel + prod RDS connection tool.

lessons.title: Silent-Catch Removal Surfaces Hidden Bugs — Expect a Wave, and Check Logs Before Guessing
lessons.one_sentence_summary: The B1a silent-catch ENFORCE sweep (Session 49, commit `5cd4551`) converted 197 `catch (e) {}` blocks to `throw err` across Meridian.

lessons.title: List-View and Detail-View Must Use the Same TABLE, Not Just the Same Column
lessons.one_sentence_summary: The providers list view showed negative/zero "Last Payout" and "4-Wk Avg" for nearly all providers.

lessons.title: Fidare-Processed Payments Are Reconciled, Not Estimated — Never Stack "Estimates" on Complete Data
lessons.one_sentence_summary: After fixing the providers list to use `erp_billable_weekly` (v3, commit `2c5ea20`), the 4-wk average was still wrong.

lessons.title: Methodology Inventory Before Methodology Layer — Audit First, Build Second
lessons.one_sentence_summary: After 4 fix attempts on providers list payouts (v1: wrong column, v2: wrong table, v3: right table but estimated comp double-count survived, v4: finally clean), we ran a full methodology inventory across both repos.

lessons.title: ERP Sync Altitude — Pull Upstream, Not Downstream
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Provider pay was derived from `erp_billable_weekly`, which is itself a downstream-derived table built by counting encounters and applying contractor rates.

lessons.title: Fresh Deploys Surface Latent Docker Landmines
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Migration 078 (ERP upstream ingest) rollout failed its first ECS deploy on two issues unrelated to the migration itself.

lessons.title: Schema-Drift Gate Triage — Five Categories
lessons.one_sentence_summary: First-pass schema-drift gate surfaced 97 EXPLAIN failures across 963 extracted SQL queries.

lessons.title: Prompt Handoff Format — Path Reference, Not Inline Dump
lessons.one_sentence_summary: When handing off a Claude Code prompt that already exists as a file in `sys/prompts/`, dumping the full prompt content inline in a code block is wasteful and error-prone.

lessons.title: Surface Git Actions Explicitly — Always Flag + Always Provide the Command
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Roger works across Cowork (strategy/content) and Claude Code (code execution) and frequently forgets which git actions are outstanding between handoffs.

lessons.title: @dnd-kit Drag + TanStack Query Optimistic PATCH — Trust the 409, Don't Pre-empt Double-Booking in UI
lessons.one_sentence_summary: S1.4b daily schedule UI (legara-portals #48) needed drag-to-reschedule that feels instant on the 15-min PT grid.

lessons.title: Pre-test API Validation with a Demo-Data Seed Step — Bundle the Seed with the Nav/Infra PR
lessons.one_sentence_summary: The S1.4a `/api/v1/scheduled-visits` backend validates provider-licensing via the `erp_encounters_weekly.licensee_id ↔ organizations.erp_client_code` bridge.

lessons.title: Seed Factories Must Denormalize the Same Fields the Service Filters On
lessons.one_sentence_summary: S1.4c's bulk clone-day endpoint filters source visits with `cancelled_at IS NULL` — a partial-index-friendly predicate.

lessons.title: Vaul Drawer + Radix Popover/cmdk Portal Collision — Route Popovers Inside Drawer Content
lessons.one_sentence_summary: S1.4b shipped the add-visit drawer with patient + provider combobox pickers (cmdk `Command` inside shadcn `Popover`).

lessons.title: Preview-Before-Commit Is the Right UX For All-or-Nothing Bulk Mutations
lessons.one_sentence_summary: S1.4c's "Import last {weekday}" bulk op clones N visits from one PT day onto another in a single transaction.

lessons.title: React 19 + StrictMode — Inline Ref Callbacks With `setState` Cause Infinite Render Loops. Use Ref-as-State.
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P003 / S1.4c's `DrawerPortalContext` (legara-portals PR #49) needed to expose the `Vaul.Content` DOM node to nested Radix popovers so they portal inside the drawer's `pointer-events: auto` subtree instead of the body's locked subtree.

lessons.title: Display Formatters For Tz-Local Values Must Not Round-Trip Through UTC. Diagnose Multi-Symptom Specs Before Patching.
lessons.one_sentence_summary: S1.4b's add-visit drawer kept 15-minute time slots as PT "HH:mm" strings ("07:00" = 7 AM PT, "19:00" = 7 PM PT).

lessons.title: Apply Lessons Broadly, Not Just To The Reported Symptom Site
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P005 (Session 91) logged a lesson about tz-local display formatters never round-tripping through UTC.

lessons.title: `setHours` / `setUTCHours` With Fixed Numbers Is a Tz Anti-Pattern — Use an Explicit-Offset Constructor
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P007 / S1.5 opened with a CI-only integration test failure.

lessons.title: Ranking-Based Suggestion UX Needs a Visual Confidence Cue Per Row
lessons.one_sentence_summary: S1.5 ranks recurring-visit suggestions by `confidence DESC, history_count DESC, last_visit_date DESC` and returns a numeric `confidence: 0..1` per row.

lessons.title: Phase 1 Discovery Earns Its Keep on Cross-Subsystem Prompts — Make It Mandatory
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P008 / S1.6 was the first cross-subsystem prompt of Sprint S1: it bridged Phase 7's Telehealth domain (deeply built, denormalized, designed before patients/scheduling existed) into S1.4's `patient_scheduled_visits` domain (built fresh again

lessons.title: Trx-Aware Service Helpers Should Be Additive Via Optional `trx` Parameter, Not a Forked Function
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P008's bridge needed `telehealth.createSession` to participate in the `patientScheduledVisits.checkinVisit` transaction so the visit-status update + the session insert commit-or-roll-back together.

lessons.title: Phase 1 Discovery As A Scope-Reduction Opportunity, Not A Spec Checkpoint
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P009 / S1.7 shipped the patient-SMS-invite pipeline.

lessons.title: Cloudflare DNS Automation Requires Token Provisioned In Advance — Pre-Sprint Prerequisite For New-Subdomain Sprints
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P010 / S2 brief called for fully-automated subdomain provisioning — S3 bucket + CloudFront distribution + bucket policy + IAM extension + GH secrets + Cloudflare CNAME — with zero human-in-browser steps per Atlas Dev Protocol's "Code owns e

lessons.title: Subagent-Dispatched Code Requires Post-Return Grep Verification Against Non-Negotiables
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P010 / S2's portals side was dispatched to a background subagent (worktree-isolated per existing feedback-parallel-agents memory) with a brief carrying three verbatim non-negotiables: (a) ErrorBoundary lands FIRST in commit order before the

lessons.title: Scaffold-Copy Carries Stale Template Strings Into New Apps — Tab Title Is The Canary
lessons.one_sentence_summary: `apps/people-directory/` was scaffolded by copying `apps/patients-admin/` and stripping patient-specific code.

lessons.title: Integration Test Harness `buildApp()` Has Explicit Mount List — Update It Every New Router
lessons.one_sentence_summary: Meridian's integration test harness (`tests/integration/harness.js`) exposes `withHttpApp(async ({ baseUrl, seed, query, ...

lessons.title: ECS Task Definition Is The Source Of Truth For Container Env — Secrets Manager Updates Alone Don't Add New Keys
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P011 / S3.0 introduced a new env var `CHAT_CHANNEL_NAMING_SECRET` (256-bit hex, consumed at module-load time in `src/services/chat/channels.js`).

lessons.title: `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS` Migrations Need Explicit "Already Exists" Logging For prod-migrate Phase I
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P011 / S3.0 migration 134 created four chat tables via a block of `CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS chat_channels (...)` + sibling statements.

lessons.title: Identity Endpoints Need Multi-Audience Dual-Auth — Single-Audience Hardcode Is A Latent Cross-Portal Bug
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P011 / S3.0 Phase 0 discovery surfaced a latent bug in `src/api/v1/auth.js::/me`.

lessons.title: Prompt-Authoring Must Cross-Check Canonical Decisions Against Prior Lessons Before Handoff
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P012 / S3.1 landed with `sys/prompts/P012-s3-1-dm-ux.md` asserting in canonical decision #11 that the Start-DM palette would hit `GET /api/v1/users?q=…&audience=chat` — "the people-directory list endpoint, which already returns every user i

lessons.title: §1714 Meta-Lesson First Post-Promotion Firing — Fired Mechanically, Surfaced A Different Class Than It Was Designed For
lessons.one_sentence_summary: §1714 (Session 97) codified "cross-check canonical decisions against prior lessons before handoff" after P012's canonical decision #11 was almost built against a boundary §1707 already ruled out.

lessons.title: Prompt-Internal Consistency — Enumerated Primitives Must Support Enumerated Endpoint Behaviors
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P013 §"Two PRs" opener enumerated six S3.0/S3.1 primitives as "every primitive needed" — `createTeamChannel`, `addChannelMember`, `removeChannelMember`, `archiveChannel`, `listChannelsForUser`, `GET /api/v1/chat/users`.

lessons.title: Phase I Comparator Normalization — Expected/Observed Type Coercion Must Be Explicit
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P014 Phase 0 diagnosis.

lessons.title: Integration Tests Must Use Deterministic PT Anchors, Not `now + offset`
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P015 / pre-S3.3 cleanup.

lessons.title: Prompt Authoring Must Grep Actual Schema Before Locking Column + Table Names
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P016 Phase 0.

lessons.title: Canonical Decisions Must Verify Every Named Entity Relationship Exists in the Current Schema
lessons.one_sentence_summary: P016 Phase 0.
